title: Ternary Cloud Cost Anomaly
description: Schema for a detected cloud cost anomaly in the Ternary FinOps platform.

cloud_provider.description: Cloud provider where the anomaly was detected

service.description: Cloud service that generated the anomaly (e.g., BigQuery, EC2)

severity.description: Severity level of the cost anomaly

status.description: Current resolution status of the anomaly

expected_cost.description: Expected cost amount based on ML-powered historical baseline (USD)

actual_cost.description: Actual observed cost amount that triggered the anomaly (USD)

cost_delta.description: Difference between actual and expected cost (USD)

detected_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the anomaly was first detected

acknowledged_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the anomaly was acknowledged

comment.description: Optional comment added when acknowledging the anomaly

affected_resources.description: List of cloud resource identifiers contributing to the anomaly
